title: Senior Fleet Manager at SFC Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at SFC Group
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
